meta.title: Nudge — AI Upsell Assistant for Clover POS
meta.description: Nudge suggests add-ons on your Clover POS while your staff takes orders. Average tickets go up 15-30%.
meta.ogTitle: Nudge — AI Upsell Assistant for Clover POS
meta.ogDescription: Your staff rings up an item. Nudge suggests what goes with it. One tap to add.

hero.badge: Coming Soon to Clover App Market
hero.heading: Every Order Could Be Worth More
hero.sub: Your staff rings up an item. Nudge suggests what goes with it, from your actual menu, in about two seconds. One tap to add it to the order.
hero.note: Free 15-min call. See Nudge in action on your menu.

mockup.suggestReason: "Most people add fries with a burger"

problem.heading: Your Staff Is Leaving Money on the Table
problem.sub: Even good employees skip the upsell. They're busy, or they just don't want to sound pushy.
problem.stat1Label: of orders get no upsell attempt
problem.stat3Label: AI upsell rate vs 45% for humans

how.heading: Three steps. That's it.
how.sub: Nudge sits on top of your existing workflow. Nothing new to learn.
how.step1Desc: Business as usual. Your staff rings up items the way they always have.
how.step2Desc: AI looks at what's in the order and picks something from your menu that goes with it. Under 2 seconds.
how.step3Desc: Staff taps once. Item goes in the order. Done.

features.heading: Built for the Way You Actually Work
features.sub: Not another app your staff ignores. Nudge fits into the moment, not around it.
features.f1Desc: Reads the current order and picks something from your actual inventory. Takes about a second.
features.f2Desc: Tap once, the item goes into the order. That's the whole interaction.
features.f3Desc: Big buttons you can read from a few feet away. Goes away on its own after 15 seconds if nobody taps.
features.f4Desc: How many suggestions got accepted, how much extra revenue came in. Updated daily on the device.

testimonial.quote: This is better than my training.
testimonial.context: After using Nudge during a pilot shift

cta.heading: See It in Action on Your Menu
cta.sub: 15 minutes. We'll set it up with your menu so you can see it work.

eula.title: End User License Agreement
eula.intro: This End User License Agreement ("Agreement") is a legal agreement between you ("User") and Enrique Flores ("Developer"), operating through 404tf.com, for the use of the Nudge application ("App") on Clover POS devices.
eula.s1Text: The Developer grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the App on Clover POS devices that you own or control, solely for your internal business purposes.
s2Items: Copy, modify, or distribute the App
Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
Rent, lease, lend, or sublicense the App
Use the App for any unlawful purpose
Remove any proprietary notices from the App
eula.s3Text: The App uses artificial intelligence to generate product suggestions. These suggestions are informational only. The Developer does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of any AI-generated suggestion. You are solely responsible for any actions taken based on these suggestions.
eula.s4Text: The App accesses your Clover order and inventory data to provide suggestions. This data is processed in accordance with our {privacyLink}. By using the App, you consent to such data processing.
eula.s5Text: The App and all related intellectual property rights are and remain the property of the Developer. This Agreement does not grant you any ownership rights in the App.
eula.s6Text: THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. THE DEVELOPER DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
eula.s7Text: IN NO EVENT SHALL THE DEVELOPER BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE APP, REGARDLESS OF THE THEORY OF LIABILITY. THE DEVELOPER'S TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FEES YOU PAID FOR THE APP IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
eula.s8Text: This Agreement is effective until terminated. The Developer may terminate this Agreement at any time if you breach any of its terms. Upon termination, you must cease all use of the App and delete all copies.
eula.s9Text: The Developer reserves the right to modify this Agreement at any time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Agreement.
eula.s10Text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Peru, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
eula.s11Text: If any provision of this Agreement is held to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
eula.s12Text: For questions about this Agreement, contact us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Enrique Flores ("we", "our", "us"), operating through 404tf.com, develops and operates the Nudge application ("App") for Clover POS devices. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.s1Intro: When you use the App, we access the following data through the Clover platform:

s1Items.label: Order Data:
s1Items.text: Current order line items (product names, quantities, prices) to generate real-time suggestions

s1Items.label: Inventory Data:
s1Items.text: Your product catalog and inventory levels to ensure suggestions reference available items

s1Items.label: Customer Data:
s1Items.text: If available through Clover's customer system, order history associated with returning customers to personalize suggestions. No payment card data or personally identifiable end-customer information is collected.

s1Items.label: Usage Statistics:
s1Items.text: Aggregated metrics such as suggestions shown, accepted, and dismissed

s2Items: To generate AI-powered upsell and cross-sell suggestions during active orders
To personalize suggestions based on customer purchase history when available
To display performance statistics within the App
To improve the quality and relevance of suggestions over time
privacy.s3Text: Order context (product names, quantities, and prices from the current order) is sent to Z.AI (Zhipu AI), our third-party AI service provider, to generate suggestions. According to Z.AI's privacy policy, they do not store any content provided through their API — inputs are processed in real time and are not saved on their servers. No personally identifiable customer information (names, emails, phone numbers, or payment data) is transmitted to the AI provider.
privacy.s4Text: Usage statistics (suggestion counts, acceptance rates, upsell history) are stored locally on your Clover device using on-device storage (SharedPreferences). We do not maintain a cloud database of your merchant data. Local data persists until you:
s4Items: Clear the App's data through your device settings
privacy.s5Intro: We do not sell, trade, or rent your data to third parties. Data is shared only in the following cases:

s5Items.label: Z.AI (Zhipu AI):
s5Items.text: Order context is sent solely to generate suggestions, with no data retained by the provider

s5Items.label: Legal obligations:
s5Items.text: When required by law, regulation, or legal process

s5Items.label: Safety:
s5Items.text: To protect the rights or safety of users

privacy.s6Text: Order context sent to Z.AI may be processed on servers located outside your country of residence, including in China. By using the App, you consent to this transfer. All transmissions are encrypted via HTTPS.
privacy.s7Intro: We implement reasonable technical measures to protect your data, including:
s7Items: HTTPS encryption for all API communications
No cloud storage of merchant data — statistics remain on-device
Leveraging the Clover platform's built-in authentication and security model
s8Items: Uninstall the App at any time, which stops all data access and removes local data
Clear local statistics by clearing the App's data in device settings
Contact us to request information about how your data is processed
Request deletion of any data we may hold by emailing us
privacy.s8Ccpa: If you are a California resident, you have the right to know what personal information is collected and to request its deletion under the CCPA. We do not sell personal information. To exercise your rights, contact us at the email below.
privacy.s9Text: The App is designed for business use on Clover POS devices and is not directed at individuals under the age of 18.
privacy.s10Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date above. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacy.s11Text: For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at
